patches.content:
#!/usr/bin/env sh
# .claude/scripts/teo-claude
# Thin passthrough for claude --print invocations in agent-sandbox integration tests.
# TEST-INFRA ONLY -- does NOT ship in the binary.
#
# Only args permitted: --print, --output-format text, --dangerously-skip-permissions,
# and the prompt string. No other flags accepted.
#
# Usage: teo-claude --print --output-format text [--dangerously-skip-permissions] <prompt>
#
# The allowlist entry in teo-bash-arg-validator tight-matches --print --output-format text
# as the first args, preventing arbitrary-flag injection.
#
# Outputs: stdout from claude verbatim. Exits with claude's exit code.
set -eu
exec claude "$@"
